name: Ampire Co., Ltd.
summary: Ampire Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells liquid crystal display (LCD) modules and touch screens for industrial applications. The company offers large, medium, and small TN, STN, FSTN, TFT, and capacitive TP modules, as well as graphic, character, and open frame products. Its products are used in non-consumer application panels, such as white home appliances, HMI, card reader, industrial instrumentation, medical devices, automobile display panel, touch panel PC/Monitor, maritime information display panel, on-board entertainment panel, smart home control display panel, kiosks, and multi-functional office machines. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
